description_long: This is a pair of modern high-rise office towers situated on a rectangular urban lot, surrounded by paved streets and landscaped areas. The left tower is predominantly white with a grid of evenly spaced windows, while the right tower features a darker facade with extensive glass and a more varied window arrangement. Both buildings rise over 20 stories and are separated by a green courtyard or plaza at ground level. The structures are constructed with reinforced concrete and glass curtain walls, giving them a sleek, contemporary appearance. The site includes driveways, parking areas, and landscaped perimeters, typical of commercial office complexes. No prominent signage is visible, and the main entrances appear to be recessed and accessible from the central plaza.
description: A pair of modern high-rise office towers with glass and concrete facades, separated by a landscaped courtyard and surrounded by urban streets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white tower in the foreground and the darker glass tower behind, with the central courtyard partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting both towers side by side, revealing the contrast between the white and dark facades and the green courtyard between them.
description_view_2: Rear view with the darker glass tower in the foreground and the white tower behind, showing the building's rear access and parking area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with both towers visible, emphasizing the symmetry and the landscaped area between the buildings.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical and horizontal grid of rectangular windows, with some variation in spacing and size between the two towers.
